privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.promiseOwner: Klosyt is owned, operated, and maintained by Gregory Yuzik ("us", or "we").
privacy.promiseText: Your privacy isn't just a feature of Klosyt — it's the foundation. We do not collect, store, transmit, or have access to any of your personal data. Period.
privacy.promiseDetail: Klosyt was built from the ground up so that your wardrobe, your photos, and your personal information never leave your device or your personal iCloud account. We cannot see your data, and we designed it that way on purpose.
privacy.zeroIntro: We want to be completely transparent: Klosyt collects nothing.
privacy.tablePhotosDetail: Stored only on your device and your personal iCloud account. We never receive or access them.
privacy.tableLocationDetail: Weather features use Apple's WeatherKit, which processes location entirely on Apple's servers. Your location is never sent to us.
privacy.tableWardrobeDetail: Clothing items, outfits, calendar entries, and preferences stay on your device and in your personal iCloud account.
privacy.tableNamesDetail: We do not collect any personally identifiable information.
privacy.tableAnalyticsDetail: We do not track how you use the App.
privacy.tableAdsDetail: There are no ads in Klosyt and no advertising SDKs.
privacy.noTrackingTitle: No Tracking. No Analytics. No Exceptions.
privacy.noTrackingText: Klosyt contains zero analytics frameworks, zero advertising SDKs, and zero tracking technologies. We do not track you across apps or websites. We do not build profiles. We do not sell data — because we don't have any to sell.
privacy.diagnosticsText: If you experience an issue and choose to contact us for support, you may use the in-app diagnostic sharing feature to send us a report. This report may include your device model, OS version, app version, and storage statistics. This only happens when you explicitly choose to share it. We use this information solely to troubleshoot your issue and do not retain it beyond that purpose.
privacy.dataYoursText: All of your content — photos, clothing items, outfits, preferences — is stored exclusively on your device and in your personal iCloud account using Apple's CloudKit. Your iCloud data is governed by Apple's Privacy Policy and protected by Apple's encryption. We have no access to it whatsoever.
privacy.permissionsIntro: Klosyt may request the following device permissions. These are used entirely on-device and no data from these permissions is ever sent to us:
privacy.permCamera: Camera (iOS) — Used to photograph your clothing items. Photos are saved to your device and your personal iCloud account only. We never receive or access your images.
privacy.permLocation: Location — Used to provide weather-based outfit suggestions through Apple's WeatherKit. Your location is sent only to Apple's servers for weather data — it is never sent to us or any third party.
privacy.permCalendar: Calendar (iOS) — Used to save planned outfits to a dedicated Klosyt calendar. The App only reads and writes to its own calendar — your personal events are never accessed.
privacy.permNotifications: Notifications — Klosyt uses local notifications only (e.g., outfit reminders). These are processed entirely on your device and are never sent through our servers.
privacy.appleWeatherKit: Apple WeatherKit — Provides weather data for outfit suggestions. Requests are processed by Apple's servers, not ours.
privacy.appleStoreKit: Apple StoreKit — Handles subscription purchases. All payment information is managed by Apple. We never receive or store your payment details.
privacy.appleCloudKit: Apple CloudKit — Syncs your wardrobe across your devices through your personal iCloud account. We cannot access this data.
privacy.applePrivacyLink: For more information, see Apple's Privacy Policy.
privacy.subscriptionsText: Klosyt+ is an optional auto-renewable subscription processed entirely by Apple through the App Store. We do not have access to your payment information. You can manage or cancel your subscription at any time in your Apple ID settings.
privacy.childrensText: We do not knowingly collect personal information from anyone, including children under 13. Since Klosyt collects no personal information from any user, there is no age-specific data handling required.
privacy.internationalText: Regardless of where you live, Klosyt's privacy-first architecture means your rights are inherently protected:
privacy.internationalAccess: Right of Access — All your data is on your device and in your personal iCloud account. You have full access at all times.
privacy.internationalRectification: Right to Rectification — You can edit or update any data directly within the app.
privacy.internationalErasure: Right to Erasure — Delete items within the app or delete the app itself to remove all local data. iCloud data can be managed through your Apple ID settings.
privacy.internationalPortability: Right to Data Portability — Your data is stored in your personal iCloud account under your control.
privacy.internationalObjection: Right to Object — Since we perform no processing of your data, there is nothing to object to.
privacy.internationalGdpr: For users in the European Economic Area (EEA), these rights are guaranteed under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). For users in Brazil, these rights are provided under the Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD). Since Klosyt collects no personal data, no data processing agreement or legal basis for processing is required.
privacy.internationalDpo: For any privacy-related inquiries, contact us at support@Klosyt.com.
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be reflected by updating the "Last Updated" date above. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact Klosyt at support@Klosyt.com.

terms.title: Terms of Use (EULA)
terms.acceptanceText: By downloading, installing, or using Klosyt ("the App"), you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the App.
terms.serviceText: Klosyt is a wardrobe management application available on iOS, macOS, tvOS, and visionOS. It allows you to catalog clothing items, create outfits, receive weather-based suggestions, and plan what to wear.
terms.serviceAiText: Klosyt's AI Stylist uses real-time weather data provided by Apple WeatherKit to generate personalized outfit suggestions. When you request an outfit suggestion, the AI analyzes current and forecasted weather conditions for your location — such as temperature, precipitation, and wind — alongside your wardrobe to recommend appropriate clothing. All AI processing is performed on-device; weather data is fetched from Apple's servers and is not sent to us or any third party.
terms.privacyText: We believe your personal data belongs to you and only you. Klosyt is architected so that we never collect, access, or store any of your personal information. Your photos, wardrobe data, and preferences remain exclusively on your device and in your personal iCloud account.
terms.ownershipText: Everything you create in Klosyt — photos, clothing items, outfits, preferences, and all other content — belongs entirely to you. Your data is stored on your device and in your personal iCloud account. We do not access, collect, or claim any rights to your content. If you delete the App, your local data is removed with it; your iCloud data is managed through your Apple ID settings.
terms.subscriptionsText: Klosyt offers an optional auto-renewable subscription ("Klosyt+") that unlocks premium features including AI outfit suggestions, outfit planning, calendar tracking, and themes. The free tier provides unlimited wardrobe storage and core functionality forever — you will never lose access to your clothing library.
terms.subBilling1: Payment is charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase.
terms.subBilling2: Subscriptions automatically renew unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current billing period.
terms.subBilling3: Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period.
terms.subBilling4: You can manage and cancel subscriptions in your Apple ID account settings at any time.
terms.subTrialText: Klosyt+ may include a free trial period. If you do not cancel before the trial ends, you will be automatically charged the subscription price.
terms.ipText: The App, including its design, code, features, and branding, is our intellectual property and is protected by applicable copyright and trademark laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or reverse-engineer any part of the App.
terms.disclaimerText: The App is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that the App will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of harmful components. Weather data and outfit suggestions are provided for informational purposes only.
terms.liabilityText: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the App, including but not limited to loss of data, loss of profits, or damage to your device.
terms.changesToTermsText: We may update these Terms from time to time. Changes will be reflected by updating the "Last Updated" date. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.governingLawText: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United States, without regard to conflict of law provisions. Nothing in these Terms affects any mandatory consumer protection rights you may have under the laws of your country of residence.
terms.acceptableUse1: Use the App for any unlawful purpose
terms.acceptableUse2: Attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or disassemble the App
terms.acceptableUse3: Circumvent any security or access controls
terms.acceptableUse4: Redistribute or resell the App or any part of it
terms.thirdPartyText: The App uses Apple services including iCloud (CloudKit), WeatherKit, and StoreKit. Your use of these services is subject to Apple's terms and conditions. We are not responsible for the availability or performance of third-party services.
terms.terminationText: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend access to the App at our discretion, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms or is harmful to other users or us.

support.headerDesc: Find answers to common questions below.
support.photosDesc: For the best results when importing clothing, hang your item against a solid, contrasting background. Ensure the lighting is bright and even to help our AI accurately remove the background and capture the true color.
support.importDesc: Add items by taking a photo, importing from your camera roll, or pasting URLs from clothing stores. You can also share directly from any app — browse in Safari and tap Share to send straight to Klosyt. Klosyt automatically drops the background so your closet looks pristine.
support.outfitsDesc: Head to the Outfits tab to mix and match your tops, bottoms, and shoes. Drag and organize layers exactly how you wear them, and save your favorite combinations for later.
support.aiDesc: Don't know what to wear? Tap the AI Stylist button! Our on-device intelligence analyzes realtime weather and your exact wardrobe to suggest the perfect outfit for any activity.
support.backupDesc: Your Klosyt data is precious. Enable iCloud sync in the app settings to securely back up your entire wardrobe. If you get a new device, sign in with the same Apple ID and your closet will seamlessly restore.
support.multiPlatformDesc: Your digital closet goes wherever you do. Klosyt is a native app across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple TV, and Vision Pro — your wardrobe is always at your fingertips.
support.managingDesc: Tap any item to view its details. Edit the category, season, color, material, and pattern. Retake photos directly from the detail view. Deleted items go to the trash first so you can recover them.
support.calendarDesc: Plan your outfits for upcoming days or events using the Calendar tab. Assign saved outfits to specific dates, track what you wore, and sync with your Apple Calendar.
support.sharingDesc: Share your favorite outfits as beautiful Pantone-style cards. Use the iOS Share Extension to import images or URLs directly from Safari, Instagram, or any other app.
support.filterDesc: Klosyt's GelCap filter system lets you narrow your wardrobe instantly. Filter by category, season, color, material, or pattern. Search by name and switch between grid and wardrobe views.
support.themesDesc: Make Klosyt your own! With Klosyt+, choose from stunning wallpapers and themes to customize your app's look & feel. Your chosen theme syncs across all your Apple devices.
support.objectCaptureDesc: On iPhone Pro models with LiDAR, create stunning 3D scans of your clothing items. Walk around the item to capture every angle. The 3D model is saved alongside the standard photo.
support.step1Desc: Take a photo, choose from your camera roll, or paste a URL. Klosyt automatically removes the background.
support.step2Desc: AI detects category, color, pattern, and more. Add season tags so the AI knows when to suggest it.
support.step3Desc: Pick items from your library, drag to reorder layers, then save your look.
support.step4Desc: Choose an activity and let Klosyt analyze weather and your wardrobe for the perfect outfit.
support.tip1Desc: Hang items on a contrasting background — white shirt on dark door, dark jacket on light wall.
support.tip2Desc: Tap the Share button in Safari, Instagram, or any app and choose Klosyt.
support.tip3Desc: Use the Calendar to track what you've worn so you always mix things up.
support.tip4Desc: Import all your everyday clothing — the more items, the better the suggestions.
support.tip5Desc: Mark items as summer, winter, or all-season for weather-appropriate outfits.
support.tip6Desc: Turn on iCloud sync right away so your wardrobe is backed up and synced everywhere.
support.manageSubTrialDesc: Try everything free for 30 days, then just $0.99/month. Cancel anytime.
support.manageSubFooter: Manage in Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions. Tap "Restore Purchases" in Klosyt Settings to reactivate.
support.ts1Answer: Make sure iCloud is enabled for Klosyt in Settings → Apple ID → iCloud. Ensure you're signed into the same Apple ID on all devices. Try toggling iCloud sync off and back on in Klosyt's settings.
support.ts2Answer: Check that Klosyt has permission to access your photo library in Settings → Klosyt → Photos. If images appear blank, try toggling iCloud sync.
support.ts3Answer: Make sure your items have accurate season tags and categories. The AI uses this metadata along with weather data. More items in your wardrobe = better suggestions.
support.ts4Answer: Go to Klosyt Settings and tap "Restore Purchases". Make sure you're signed in with the Apple ID used for the purchase.
support.ts5Answer: For best results, photograph items against a solid, contrasting background with even lighting. Avoid busy backgrounds or shadows.
support.ts6Answer: Make sure Location Services are enabled for Klosyt in Settings → Privacy & Security → Location Services. Select "While Using the App" or "Always" to allow weather updates.
support.ts7Summary: Items appear blurry or low quality
support.ts7Answer: Images may still be downloading from iCloud. Ensure a stable internet connection and wait for the sync to complete. Photos taken in-app are stored at full resolution.
support.ts8Summary: How do I delete an item?
support.ts8Answer: Tap an item → detail view → delete button. Deleted items go to the Trash for 30 days and can be recovered. Access the Trash from Settings.
support.contactDesc: We're here to help. Reach out at
